name: summarize
title: Summarize
description: Summarize video URLs using the local Summarize HTTP API. Two options: paste a URL directly or use clipboard content.
author: martinopiaggi

commands.name: summarize
commands.title: Summarize
commands.description: Summarize a video URL. Paste or type the URL directly next to the command.

commands.name: summarize-clipboard
commands.title: Summarize Clipboard
commands.description: Send the clipboard content (video URL) to the Summarize HTTP API

preferences.name: apiEndpoint
preferences.title: Summarize API Endpoint
preferences.description: Base URL of the Summarize HTTP API
